completion_data.completion_summary: Restructured cslib task graph: created tasks 20-23 for standalone Propositional/Modal/Temporal/Temporal-Semantics modules with seed research reports, revised tasks 2-7/12/17 to reflect modular factoring, populated ROADMAP.md with 4-phase porting plan and 6-wave dependency structure, and restructured TODO.md Task Order into topic groupings.

memory_candidates.content: When factoring BimodalLogic into standalone modules, DeductionTheorem cannot be ported generically to Foundations/PropositionalHilbert level because it requires structural induction on the concrete DerivationTree type, which does not exist at the Prop-valued DerivableIn level. Keep per-logic in modules where concrete derivation trees exist.

BimodalTMHilbert diamond-avoidance pattern for extending TemporalBXHilbert: instead of making BimodalTMHilbert extend TemporalBXHilbert directly (creates diamond with PropositionalHilbert), have BimodalTMHilbert extend the individual temporal HasAxiom* classes directly (same pattern as BimodalConnectives extends HasUntil/HasSince), then provide a manual instance deriving TemporalBXHilbert from BimodalTMHilbert.

artifacts.summary: Implementation summary for all 4 phases of task 19 modular logic factoring restructuring
Seed research for task 20: propositional Hilbert theorems to Foundations
Seed research for task 21: modal proof system and theorems
Seed research for task 22: temporal infrastructure and theorems
Seed research for task 23: temporal semantics on linear orders
